name: beautiful-codebase
category: Code · Any project → beautiful analysis report
description: Take any code project (language-agnostic: Java / Python / Go / TS / Rust / ...) and turn it into a single-file, offline-openable HTML analysis report. Sister skill to beautiful-article: same reacticle scaffold, theme system, cover, colophon, PDF export. Different pipeline: a Discover stage builds an inventory + business-evidence corpus from the repo (codegraph -> rg -> grep tier fallback), a three-stage write (Evidence -> Business Distillation -> Writing) physically severs hallucination, and mermaid renders architecture / call-chain / business-domain diagrams. Ships three reader profiles (architecture-review / onboarding / archaeology) and a code-native terminal theme.
